name: async_reset_non_const_value
description: Code should include an always_ff block with asynchronous reset where the reset assignment uses a non-constant value (wire/variable input) rather than a literal constant.
snippet: always_ff @ (posedge clk or negedge rstn) if (!rstn) value <= rstval;

name: active_low_async_reset
description: Code should include an active-low asynchronous reset with negated condition in always_ff, using negedge in sensitivity list and !reset condition check.
snippet: always_ff @ (posedge clk or negedge rstn) if (!rstn) value <= rstval;

name: dff_with_arst_and_data_output
description: Code should include a D flip-flop with asynchronous reset where the reset value signal is a wire fed from another process or input, creating an $aldff cell.
snippet: wire value_next = ~value; always_ff @ (posedge clk or negedge rstn) if (!rstn) value <= rstval; else value <= value_next;
